project_constraints.charset_note: Gate FALHOU: a fonte do jogo não tem diacríticos — pangrama pt-BR renderiza como '@' (evidência in-game: artifacts/char1.png, char2.png). Estratégia adotada: TRANSLITERAÇÃO na gravação (acento→ASCII) no reinsert.py; a tradução canônica mantém os acentos. Ver decision_log.md.

glossary_subset.notes: Nome dado ao protagonista por Kuon em 11_02 (0x12668). reveal_timing: cena 11_02. Antes disso ele é sem nome.

lines: Características: acolhe sem pressionar ("Apenas relaxe..."); curiosa mas paciente; calor humano.
Red flags: soar fria, clínica ou impaciente; formalidade excessiva.
Haku (protagonista, narração 1ª pessoa) — `voice_criticality: high`. Predomina nas 2 cenas:
Características: sentenças curtas e definitivas; duplo sentido ("um mundo totalmente novo te espera"); ambiguidade ameaçadora.
Red flags: soar caloroso/paternal; resolver a ambiguidade (a fala deve permanecer dúbia).
Características: frases quebradas por reticências; perguntas curtas ("Quem... é você...?"); pouca pontuação forte.
Red flags: falas fluentes/articuladas demais; perder o tom de torpor; pontuação "limpa" que apaga a fragmentação.

decisions.title: Opcode de RÓTULO DE FALANTE `53 00` + reconcile de speaker (data-driven)
decisions.summary: **Problema:** in-game, o rótulo de falante aparecia em **inglês** ("Girl") mesmo com a tradução ("Garota") aprovada e gravada. RE: o nome do falante usa um **2º opcode de ponteiro, `53 00`** (mesmo formato file-relativo do `50 00` de diálogo), que o conector ignorava. Resultado: "Girl"→"Garota"

decisions.title: Gate de charset pt-BR — método e veredito
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar `target_charset_supported: likely` e exigir confirmação in-game antes de produção. **Alternativas consideradas:** - Confirmar por presença no texto-fonte — **insuficiente**: o fonte é inglês e quase não usa acentos (só `õ` e `À` aparecem em texto real).

decisions.title: Anomalia 0x33f9 — texto PT/EN corrompido na fonte
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar a linha `0x33f9` como anomalia de fonte (não traduzir em cima do lixo; tratar como linha de sistema reescrita). **Razão:** A string original já vem misturada PT/EN e truncada ("...SISTEMAS AM . RESTARTING...") no próprio jogo. Não é erro de extração. O conector deve sinali

decisions.title: Charset — transliteração na gravação (gate FALHOU)
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Marcar `target_charset_supported: false` e **transliterar** (acento → ASCII) na gravação do binário. A tradução canônica (`approved_translations.csv`, `translation_plan.json`) **mantém os acentos** (correta para QA/revisão); apenas os bytes escritos no jogo são dobrados para ASCI

decisions.title: Escopo cognitivo — 75 → 1025 linhas (cenas 11_01 + 11_02); reveal de Haku in-corpus
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Re-rodar o pipeline completo em escala (cenas 11_01 + 11_02 = 1025 linhas). Novos termos canônicos: **Kuon** (nome revelado em 0x108db), **Haku** (nome dado ao protagonista em 0x12668 — reveal agora **dentro do corpus**), **Tatari** (criatura imortal), **aperyu** (vestimenta), **

decisions.title: CORREÇÃO CRÍTICA — ponteiros são FILE-RELATIVOS, não absolutos
decisions.summary: **Decisão tomada:** Ao investigar o "opcode de início de bloco", descobri que **`50 00`+uint32 é um offset RELATIVO ao início do arquivo (Pack)**, não absoluto. Endereço da string = `file_start_do_site + uint32`. Prova: dos ~47k sites, **42.101** só apontam para string como file-relativos vs **63**

tm_exact.source: Phew. I'm out of the bath.
tm_exact.target: Ufa. Saí do banho.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I return to the room, relaxed and refreshed, to find\n
tm_exact.target: Volto pro quarto, relaxado e renovado, e encontro\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Kuon sitting in the corner with her back turned.
tm_exact.target: a Kuon sentada no canto, de costas.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Kuon, I'm out...?
tm_exact.target: Kuon, eu já saí...?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: What's going on?
tm_exact.target: O que tá acontecendo?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: No reply. She doesn't seem to even notice me.
tm_exact.target: Sem resposta. Ela nem parece me notar.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: When I approach, I can faintly hear her muttering to\n
tm_exact.target: Quando me aproximo, ouço fraquinho ela murmurando\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: herself, gaze vacant...
tm_exact.target: pra si mesma, o olhar vazio...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: It sounds like she's saying "thwap, thwap," but it's\n
tm_exact.target: Parece que ela tá dizendo "pá, pá", mas é\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: difficult to make out.
tm_exact.target: difícil de entender.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: ...Kuon?
tm_exact.target: ...Kuon?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I put my hand on her shoulder.
tm_exact.target: Ponho a mão no ombro dela.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Eep!
tm_exact.target: Iiep!
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Whoa!
tm_exact.target: Uou!
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: G-Geez, don't surprise me like that.
tm_exact.target: C-Caramba, não me assusta desse jeito.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: I-I'm the one who's surprised, here. Did something\n
tm_exact.target: E-Eu é que me assustei, aqui. Aconteceu\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: happen?
tm_exact.target: alguma coisa?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Huh?
tm_exact.target: Hein?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: You had a thousand-yard stare and you were mumbling\n
tm_exact.target: Você tava com o olhar perdido e murmurando\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: like you'd seen something awful. What happened?
tm_exact.target: como se tivesse visto algo horrível. O que houve?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Why are you averting your eyes?
tm_exact.target: Por que você tá desviando o olhar?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I-I'm not... averting them...
tm_exact.target: N-Não tô... desviando...
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Despite her words, Kuon is, in fact, looking entirely\n
tm_exact.target: Apesar do que diz, a Kuon está, de fato, olhando\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: to one side of me.
tm_exact.target: totalmente pro lado de mim.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: No, you definitely are.
tm_exact.target: Não, você tá sim.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I round on her and place myself in front of her\n
tm_exact.target: Me viro pra ela e me ponho na frente dos\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: eyes, but she turns away again.
tm_exact.target: olhos dela, mas ela desvia de novo.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: And your face is bright red. What's the deal?
tm_exact.target: E sua cara tá vermelhíssima. Que que tá rolando?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I lean down and put my face right in front of hers. She still\n
tm_exact.target: Me abaixo e ponho meu rosto bem na frente do dela. Ela ainda\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: refuses to make eye contact.
tm_exact.target: se recusa a fazer contato visual.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Instead, her cheeks turn even redder--and her eyes\n
tm_exact.target: Em vez disso, as bochechas dela ficam mais vermelhas--e os olhos\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: are bloodshot like she's been drinking.
tm_exact.target: injetados como se ela tivesse bebido.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Your eyes are red, too. Are you feeling...?
tm_exact.target: Seus olhos também estão vermelhos. Você tá se sentindo...?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: *WHUMF--*
tm_exact.target: *BAM--*
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Wh--
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Out of the blue, Kuon grabs me and tosses me away\n
tm_exact.target: Do nada, a Kuon me agarra e me arremessa\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: like a ragdoll with that casual strength of hers.
tm_exact.target: como um boneco de pano, com aquela força casual dela.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: *FLUMP*
tm_exact.target: *PUF*
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Urgh...
tm_exact.target: Argh...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: My body flies through the air, landing squarely\n
tm_exact.target: Meu corpo voa pelo ar e cai bem\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: on the bed.
tm_exact.target: em cima da cama.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Wh-What are you d--
tm_exact.target: Q-Que que você tá faz--
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: You needn't concern yourself with me. More\n
tm_exact.target: Você não precisa se preocupar comigo. Mais\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: importantly, why didn't you tell me about THIS?
tm_exact.target: importante: por que você não me contou sobre ISSO?
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Kuon pulls my feet upward and inspects the soles.
tm_exact.target: A Kuon levanta meus pés e inspeciona as solas.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Tell you what?
tm_exact.target: Te contar o quê?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Was there something I needed to tell her...?
tm_exact.target: Tinha algo que eu precisava contar pra ela...?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Kuon ignores the question, frowning deeply at the\n
tm_exact.target: A Kuon ignora a pergunta, franzindo a testa diante\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: sight of my ruined soles.
tm_exact.target: das minhas solas arruinadas.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: If you'd said something, I wouldn't have made you\n
tm_exact.target: Se você tivesse falado algo, eu não teria te feito\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: strain yourself this much today.
tm_exact.target: se esforçar tanto hoje.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: ...What!? I did tell you. Repeatedly.
tm_exact.target: ...Quê!? Eu te contei. Várias vezes.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I run through the day's events in my mind...
tm_exact.target: Repasso os acontecimentos do dia na cabeça...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I did gripe and complain, several times... I...
tm_exact.target: Eu reclamei e resmunguei, várias vezes... Eu...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Actually, come to think of it, I never complained\n
tm_exact.target: Na verdade, pensando bem, eu nunca reclamei\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: aloud--I only ever muttered my gripes...
tm_exact.target: em voz alta--só resmunguei as queixas...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Hold still for a moment.
tm_exact.target: Fica parado um instante.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Kuon takes several small pills from the pouch at\n
tm_exact.target: A Kuon pega várias pílulas pequenas da bolsa na\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: her waist and puts them into her mouth, chewing.
tm_exact.target: cintura, põe na boca e mastiga.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: What's that?
tm_exact.target: O que é isso?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Kuon only smiles, taking the chewed-up glob from her\n
tm_exact.target: A Kuon só sorri, tirando a pasta mastigada da\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: mouth and smearing it on my feet.
tm_exact.target: boca e passando nos meus pés.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: This will sting a bit.
tm_exact.target: Isso vai arder um pouquinho.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: I can't quite figure out why, but a chill rolls down\n
tm_exact.target: Não sei bem por quê, mas um arrepio desce\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: my spine at the sight of that cheerful smile.
tm_exact.target: pela minha espinha ao ver aquele sorriso alegre.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: *Rub, slip, slather--*
tm_exact.target: *Esfrega, escorrega, lambuza--*
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Kuon's fingers work the substance into my feet,\n
tm_exact.target: Os dedos da Kuon trabalham a substância nos meus pés,\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: paying special attention to where the skin peels.
tm_exact.target: com atenção especial onde a pele descasca.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Is she applying a salve, or something? It's\n
tm_exact.target: Ela tá passando uma pomada, ou algo assim? Tá\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: definitely stinging...
tm_exact.target: ardendo, com certeza...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Ow, hhhh--
tm_exact.target: Ai, hhhh--
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Maybe stinging isn't quite the word. It itches and\n
tm_exact.target: Talvez arder não seja bem a palavra. Coça e\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: tingles more than it stings.
tm_exact.target: formiga mais do que arde.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: It's probably the medicine, but suddenly, I can't\n
tm_exact.target: Deve ser o remédio, mas de repente não\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: contain the urge to scratch my itching feet--
tm_exact.target: consigo conter a vontade de coçar os pés--
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: But when I reach for them, Kuon bats my hand away.
tm_exact.target: Mas quando vou neles, a Kuon dá um tapa na minha mão.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Ah, ah, no touching. It'll be uncomfortable, but its\n
tm_exact.target: Ah, ah, sem tocar. Vai ser incômodo, mas a\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: effectiveness is second to none!
tm_exact.target: eficácia é imbatível!
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Arrrgh, so THAT'S why she was smiling. God, it\n
tm_exact.target: Arrrgh, então é por ISSO que ela tava sorrindo. Deus, como\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: itches, it itches--
tm_exact.target: coça, como coça--
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: That should just about do it. It'll settle down\n
tm_exact.target: Acho que é isso. Vai acalmar\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: after a while, so hang in there until then, OK?
tm_exact.target: daqui a pouco, então aguenta firme até lá, tá?
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Still smiling, Kuon expertly wraps my feet in tight\n
tm_exact.target: Ainda sorrindo, a Kuon enfaixa meus pés com perícia,\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: bandages, sealing in the salve.
tm_exact.target: apertado, selando a pomada.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: And for good measure...
tm_exact.target: E só por garantia...
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Kuon sets an odd, legged jar next to my pillow.
tm_exact.target: A Kuon põe um pote esquisito, com pés, ao lado do meu travesseiro.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Hmhm. Just watch.
tm_exact.target: Hmhm. Só observa.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: She removes the jar's perforated lid. The inside\n
tm_exact.target: Ela tira a tampa furada do pote. O interior\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: looks to be packed with white ash.
tm_exact.target: parece cheio de cinza branca.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Then, nestling a small piece of charcoal in the ash,\n
tm_exact.target: Então, acomodando um pedacinho de carvão na cinza,\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: she lights it and waits for a moment...
tm_exact.target: ela o acende e espera um instante...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Finally, another small, black pill goes on top of\n
tm_exact.target: Por fim, outra pílula pequena e preta vai em cima\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: the lit charcoal.
tm_exact.target: do carvão aceso.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: A moment passes, and sweet, fruity scents begin to\n
tm_exact.target: Passa um instante, e aromas doces e frutados começam a\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: waft from the jar, filling my nostrils.
tm_exact.target: subir do pote, enchendo minhas narinas.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: An incense burner, huh...
tm_exact.target: Um incensário, é...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Exactly.
tm_exact.target: Exato.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: This particular incense is a blend of aromatic and\n
tm_exact.target: Esse incenso é uma mistura de ervas aromáticas e\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: pain-relieving herbs.
tm_exact.target: analgésicas.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: It'll relieve your fatigue and pain, and it has\n
tm_exact.target: Vai aliviar sua fadiga e dor, e tem\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: ancillary properties that facilitate sleep, I think?
tm_exact.target: propriedades secundárias que facilitam o sono, eu acho?
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Even as Kuon speaks, I can feel the fragrance\n
tm_exact.target: Enquanto a Kuon fala, já sinto a fragrância\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: soothing my mind and dulling my pain.\n
tm_exact.target: acalmando minha mente e amenizando a dor.\n
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I feel... light.
tm_exact.target: Me sinto... leve.
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Oh... oh, that's... blissful...
tm_exact.target: Ah... ah, isso é... uma bênção...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: I think the concentration might be a little high.\n
tm_exact.target: Acho que a concentração pode estar um pouco alta.\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Are you feeling OK? You don't feel ill?
tm_exact.target: Você está bem? Não tá passando mal?
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: No, I'm... I'm good... I'm really, REALLY good...
tm_exact.target: Não, eu... tô bem... Tô muito, MUITO bem...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Getting... sleepy... Eyelids... heavy...
tm_exact.target: Ficando... com sono... Pálpebras... pesadas...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Now, are you feeling pain anywhere else? ...Haku?\n
tm_exact.target: E então, tá sentindo dor em mais algum lugar? ...Haku?\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: Haku, that's my bed, you can't sl--
tm_exact.target: Haku, essa é a minha cama, você não pode dor--
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: I'm sinking...
tm_exact.target: Tô afundando...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: My consciousness... swirling away into oblivion...
tm_exact.target: Minha consciência... se esvaindo no esquecimento...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Hey, Haku. Hey--\n
tm_exact.target: Ei, Haku. Ei--\n
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: ...Sheesh.
tm_exact.target: ...Aff.
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: I picked up quite a burden out there, didn't I...?
tm_exact.target: Acabei pegando um belo de um fardo por aí, né...?
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: But I suppose that's... my...
tm_exact.target: Mas suponho que isso seja... o meu...
tm_exact.speaker: Kuon

tm_exact.source: What is... this music?
tm_exact.target: Que... música é essa?
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: It's... soft. And a little nostalgic...
tm_exact.target: É... suave. E um pouco nostálgica...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Where have I... heard it before? I feel like I've...
tm_exact.target: Onde eu... já ouvi isso? Sinto que eu já...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_exact.source: Some... where...
tm_exact.target: Em algum... lugar...
tm_exact.speaker: Haku

tm_voice.speaker: Haku
tm_voice.source: Well, guess the sun still rises no matter where\n
tm_voice.target: Enfim, o sol nasce em qualquer lugar, pelo visto\n

tm_voice.speaker: Haku
tm_voice.source: I am. Still... What am I supposed to do now...?
tm_voice.target: Pois é. Mesmo assim... O que é que eu faço agora...?

lines.source: Phew. I'm out of the bath.
I return to the room, relaxed and refreshed, to find\n
Kuon sitting in the corner with her back turned.
Kuon, I'm out...?
What's going on?
No reply. She doesn't seem to even notice me.
When I approach, I can faintly hear her muttering to\n
herself, gaze vacant...
It sounds like she's saying "thwap, thwap," but it's\n
difficult to make out.
...Kuon?
I put my hand on her shoulder.
Eep!
Whoa!
G-Geez, don't surprise me like that.
I-I'm the one who's surprised, here. Did something\n
happen?
Huh?
You had a thousand-yard stare and you were mumbling\n
like you'd seen something awful. What happened?
Why are you averting your eyes?
I-I'm not... averting them...
Despite her words, Kuon is, in fact, looking entirely\n
to one side of me.
No, you definitely are.
I round on her and place myself in front of her\n
eyes, but she turns away again.
And your face is bright red. What's the deal?
I lean down and put my face right in front of hers. She still\n
refuses to make eye contact.
Instead, her cheeks turn even redder--and her eyes\n
are bloodshot like she's been drinking.
Your eyes are red, too. Are you feeling...?
*WHUMF--*
Wh--
Out of the blue, Kuon grabs me and tosses me away\n
like a ragdoll with that casual strength of hers.
*FLUMP*
Urgh...
My body flies through the air, landing squarely\n
on the bed.
Wh-What are you d--
You needn't concern yourself with me. More\n
importantly, why didn't you tell me about THIS?
Kuon pulls my feet upward and inspects the soles.
Tell you what?
Was there something I needed to tell her...?
Kuon ignores the question, frowning deeply at the\n
sight of my ruined soles.
If you'd said something, I wouldn't have made you\n
strain yourself this much today.
...What!? I did tell you. Repeatedly.
I run through the day's events in my mind...
I did gripe and complain, several times... I...
Actually, come to think of it, I never complained\n
aloud--I only ever muttered my gripes...
Hold still for a moment.
Kuon takes several small pills from the pouch at\n
her waist and puts them into her mouth, chewing.
What's that?
Kuon only smiles, taking the chewed-up glob from her\n
mouth and smearing it on my feet.
This will sting a bit.
I can't quite figure out why, but a chill rolls down\n
my spine at the sight of that cheerful smile.
*Rub, slip, slather--*
Kuon's fingers work the substance into my feet,\n
paying special attention to where the skin peels.
Is she applying a salve, or something? It's\n
definitely stinging...
Ow, hhhh--
Maybe stinging isn't quite the word. It itches and\n
tingles more than it stings.
It's probably the medicine, but suddenly, I can't\n
contain the urge to scratch my itching feet--
But when I reach for them, Kuon bats my hand away.
Ah, ah, no touching. It'll be uncomfortable, but its\n
effectiveness is second to none!
Arrrgh, so THAT'S why she was smiling. God, it\n
itches, it itches--
That should just about do it. It'll settle down\n
after a while, so hang in there until then, OK?
Still smiling, Kuon expertly wraps my feet in tight\n
bandages, sealing in the salve.
And for good measure...
Kuon sets an odd, legged jar next to my pillow.
Hmhm. Just watch.
She removes the jar's perforated lid. The inside\n
looks to be packed with white ash.
Then, nestling a small piece of charcoal in the ash,\n
she lights it and waits for a moment...
Finally, another small, black pill goes on top of\n
the lit charcoal.
A moment passes, and sweet, fruity scents begin to\n
waft from the jar, filling my nostrils.
An incense burner, huh...
Exactly.
This particular incense is a blend of aromatic and\n
pain-relieving herbs.
It'll relieve your fatigue and pain, and it has\n
ancillary properties that facilitate sleep, I think?
Even as Kuon speaks, I can feel the fragrance\n
soothing my mind and dulling my pain.\n
I feel... light.
Oh... oh, that's... blissful...
I think the concentration might be a little high.\n
Are you feeling OK? You don't feel ill?
No, I'm... I'm good... I'm really, REALLY good...
Getting... sleepy... Eyelids... heavy...
Now, are you feeling pain anywhere else? ...Haku?\n
Haku, that's my bed, you can't sl--
I'm sinking...
My consciousness... swirling away into oblivion...
Hey, Haku. Hey--\n
...Sheesh.
I picked up quite a burden out there, didn't I...?
But I suppose that's... my...
What is... this music?
It's... soft. And a little nostalgic...
Where have I... heard it before? I feel like I've...
Some... where...
